The '''Sentinel''' was a [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] [[Mech/Legends|mech]] manufactured and employed by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. It was armed with a light laser cannon mounted on an arm that protruded from the cockpit.

Th Sentinel vehicle was effective at disrupting infantry formations, however, it was weak against heavier armored units such as the [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]]. It was also fast enough to be used for scouting. Upgraded versions of the vehicle were known as '''Heavy Sentinels'''.
[[File:WookieeSentinel.jpg|thumb|220x220px|Sentinel (top) and Heavy Sentinel (bottom) seen in-game.]]
